case_title: JOSEPH MILES VS. GOLDEN GATE TOW INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MILES, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILES, JOSEPH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILES, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-02-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AT 8:30AM, HE ARRIVED LATE AT 9:30AM FOR HEARING, DEFENDANT HAD ALREADY LEFT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
